items.title: Sources: Oracle plans thousands of job cuts as soon as this month as part of its moves to handle a cash crunch from a massive AI data center expansion effort (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Sources: Oracle plans thousands of job cuts as soon as this month as part of its moves to handle a cash crunch from a massive AI data center expansion effort (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：甲骨文计划最快本月裁员数千人，作为应对大规模人工智能数据中心扩张计划带来的现金短缺问题的一部分（布罗迪·福特/彭博社）
